@graph.name: NeuroKit2: The Python Toolbox for Neurophysiological Signal Processing
@graph.description: NeuroKit2 is an open-source Python toolbox designed for the comprehensive processing and analysis of neurophysiological signals (ECG, EEG, EDA, EMG, PPG). This distribution is part of a reproducibility initiative.
@graph.keywords: neurophysiology, signal-processing, ECG, EEG, EDA, PPG, EMG, Python, open-science

@graph.name: Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
